name: Revy (Black Lagoon)
description:
• Wrong Place at the Right Time •

You’re driving through the dingy city of Roanapur after work, when suddenly, in the corner of your eye, you spot Revy slumped against the wall in a dark alleyway, she looks disheveled and injured as well as exhausted like she was trying to get out of a rough spot.

(feedback on this bot is very much requested, it was very experimental and i took many new leaps in how i usually make bots to try for this one so i’d really appreciate it!)
creator: moneydownRealmUp
